basic_details.job_title: WAMUL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Assistant/ Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: West Assam Milk Producers' Cooperative Union (WAMUL)
basic_details.short_information: West Assam Milk Producers' Cooperative Union (WAMUL) Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website purabi.coop. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the WAMUL Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Relaxation up to 3 years may be given in case of extraordinary/outstanding candidates or candidates with relevant experience.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time B.Com from a recognized Institute/ University
qualification.details: Full time B.Com from a recognized Institute/ University

selection_process: Document Verification Written Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WAMUL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WAMUL Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the WAMUL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download WAMUL Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) Job 2026 Notification PDF

Selection Process
content_sections.text: Document Verification Written Test Personal Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WAMUL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WAMUL Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the WAMUL Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) posts is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) post is a full-time Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) degree from a recognized Institute or University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) post is 32 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for WAMUL recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 3.92 lakhs to Rs. 6.53 lakhs per annum.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) post in the West Assam Milk Producers' Cooperative Union (WAMUL) recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the WAMUL Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) recruitment includes Document Verification, a Written Test, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) position at WAMUL is on a Contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the WAMUL Sr. Assistant/ Assistant (Procurement & Input) recruitment can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Assam apply for this job?
faq.answer: The notification states that eligible candidates are invited from Assam. It is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification PDF for specific state-related requirements.
